constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers

reference_templates.title: Mixed language attributes
reference_templates.notes: One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Mixed languages

reference_templates.title: Optgroup select
reference_templates.notes: Department select uses optgroup for grouping options
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Optgroup select

reference_templates.title: Concatenated label words
reference_templates.notes: Teamtailor-style bug: "first namerequired" with no space before required
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Concatenated label

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Reference DOM (Mixed language attributes): One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields Reference DOM (Optgroup select): Department select uses optgroup for grouping options Reference DOM (Concatenated label words): Teamtailor-style bug: "first namerequired" with no space before required Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: div-role-textbox, decoy-form, duplicate-name-attrs, details-accordion, split-phone. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Mixed language attributes; Optgroup select; Concatenated label words.
